hero.title: AutoCount Plugin
hero.body: A curated library of AutoCount Accounting plugins used by KSL Business Solutions, separated by plugins built by our team and plugins supplied by other AutoCount dealers.

intro.heading: Find the right AutoCount Accounting plugin
intro.body: Search by plugin name, workflow, category, dealer, or supported AutoCount module. Each plugin card points to the related page or contact action when available.

sections.label: Built by KSL
sections.heading: Plugins We Built
sections.body: Plugins developed by KSL Business Solutions for practical AutoCount workflows and local SME operations.
sections.empty: No KSL-built plugins have been added yet.

items.name: Sales2DO
items.summary: Generate Delivery Orders directly from existing Invoices or Cash Sales, with smart quantity control for partial and fully delivered documents.
features: Copy Invoice or Cash Sale to Delivery Order
Prevent over-delivery with outstanding quantity checks
Preset delivery quantity and transfer remark settings
Includes KS Omni support and feedback entry point

sections.label: Other Dealers
sections.heading: Plugins From Other Dealers
sections.body: AutoCount Accounting plugins supplied by other dealers that we can document, support, or reference for customers who already use them.
sections.empty: No other dealer plugins have been added yet.
